DECLARATION OF ILLISE SCHULMAN IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF AND FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 18100047) FILED BY DEFENDANT GIRI, SAROJ

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT SAROJ GIRI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF, AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. RESPONSES TO THE INTERROGATORIES AND RFPDS TO BE SERVED BY 5/29/18. PLAINTIFF SHALL APPEAR FOR A DEPOSITION AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME AGREED UPON BY COUNSEL NO LATER THAN 6/4/18. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $350 AWARDED TO DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.=302/JPT

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Arne J. Nelson, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the defendant. Counsel for plaintiff notified the Court that the case has settled. The Court scheduled the case for an Order To Show Cause re Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1312 for JAN-08-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alston L. Lew of the Law Office of Catherine A. Walsh, Tel. No. 1-925-825-9716 appearing for the defendant;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAROJ GIRI's Motion To Compel Answer To Interrogatories And Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff, And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Responses to the interrogatories and RFPDs to be served by 5/29/18. Plaintiff shall appear for a deposition at a mutually convenient time agreed upon by counsel no later than 6/4/18. Sanctions in the amount of $350 awarded to Defendants. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.=302/jpt
